problemStatement: Workers inherit host ~/.claude/ state causing non-reproducibility, and Palantir Skill Pack format is incompatible with Claude Code plugin ecosystem. Users cannot reuse ecosystem plugins like agent-olympus in workers without polluting the host Claude Code session.
targetUsers: Solo Operator (primary: localhost single-user), Team Admin (future: shared Console), Pack Author (future: preset author/sharer).
goals: G1: Host-isolation-safe worker execution — preset isolated=true blocks ~/.claude/{plugins,skills,settings} leakage (verified by canary test).
G2: Ecosystem plugin reuse — agent-olympus placed in server/plugins/ + preset reference → Claude worker runs its slash commands.
G3: Zero regression to existing 671+ tests and Skill Pack behavior.
G4: MCP consistency across Claude/Codex/OpenCode workers via Tier 1 portable registry.
G5: Full preset snapshot on every non-manager run (preset_snapshot_hash + per-file hashes).
nonGoals: Remote plugin marketplace (users cannot install arbitrary plugins via API in v1).
Plugin content audit/sandboxing (plugin trust is user's responsibility).
Auto-conversion between Claude plugins and Palantir Skill Packs (kept orthogonal).
Preset inheritance/composition (flat presets only in v1).
Dynamic preset reload for running workers (snapshots are frozen at spawn).
Auto-copying from host ~/.claude/plugins/* into server/plugins/ (violates isolation goal).

userStories.title: Create Worker Preset
userStories.iWantTo: create a reusable Worker Preset (name, isolation, plugin_refs, mcp_server_ids, base_system_prompt)
userStories.soThat: worker spawn can repeatedly specify the environment
acceptanceCriteria: GIVEN operator POSTs /api/worker-presets with valid body WHEN server validates (name unique, plugin_refs exist in server/plugins/, mcp_server_ids exist, base_system_prompt ≤16KB) THEN 201 with created row
GIVEN plugin_refs contains a nonexistent name WHEN POST THEN 400 with 'Unknown plugin ref' error

userStories.title: Apply preset on worker spawn
userStories.soThat: the worker runs with the defined environment
acceptanceCriteria: GIVEN task has preferred_preset_id or /execute body has preset_id WHEN lifecycleService.executeTask spawns the worker THEN Tier 1 applied (MCP config + base system prompt) AND if isolated=true then Tier 2 applied for Claude adapter only (--bare --strict-mcp-config --setting-sources '' --plugin-dir <path>) AND runs.preset_id + preset_snapshot_hash recorded
GIVEN no preset_id supplied WHEN worker spawns THEN existing legacy behavior preserved (host inheritance + skill pack overlay only)

userStories.title: Claude plugin injection
userStories.iWantTo: use ecosystem Claude plugins (e.g. agent-olympus) in a Palantir worker
userStories.soThat: ecosystem assets are reusable without polluting host Claude Code
acceptanceCriteria: GIVEN server/plugins/agent-olympus/ is populated AND Preset P1 sets plugin_refs=['agent-olympus'] + isolated=true WHEN Claude worker spawns THEN spawn args include '--plugin-dir <absolute path>' + --bare + --strict-mcp-config AND slash commands from agent-olympus are callable in the session
GIVEN the same preset used with Codex/OpenCode adapter THEN Tier 2 args are skipped AND run_events records 'preset:tier2_skipped' warning AND Tier 1 MCP still applied

userStories.title: Auth compatibility with --bare
acceptanceCriteria: GIVEN preset isolated=true WHEN Claude worker spawns THEN env contains CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN (from .claude-auth.json) AND worker completes first turn receiving 'result' event
GIVEN no valid Claude auth in .claude-auth.json / ANTHROPIC_API_KEY WHEN isolated preset spawn attempted THEN 400 with 'Isolated preset requires valid Claude auth' error (fail-closed)

userStories.title: Preset snapshot recorded on every run
userStories.iWantTo: know which exact preset + plugin files were applied to each past run
acceptanceCriteria: GIVEN a worker run spawned with preset P1 THEN runs.preset_snapshot_hash = SHA-256(preset JSON + sorted file hashes) AND run_preset_snapshots row contains snapshot_json + file_hashes
GIVEN preset P1 is edited later WHEN historical snapshot queried THEN pre-edit values returned (snapshot row unchanged)

userStories.title: Preset management UI
userStories.soThat: I don't run REST commands by hand
acceptanceCriteria: GIVEN #presets page loaded WHEN 'New Preset' clicked THEN modal with name + isolated toggle + plugin_refs multi-select (from server/plugins/ listing) + mcp multi-select + system prompt textarea (16KB counter)
GIVEN Task edit modal WHEN preferred_preset_id dropdown opened THEN worker_presets list + 'None (default)' option AND on save tasks.preferred_preset_id is updated

userStories.title: Canary isolation test (non-functional, CI)
userStories.iWantTo: automatically verify --bare blocks host plugin leakage
acceptanceCriteria: GIVEN test fixtures place ~/.claude/plugins/test-canary-plugin/ (tmpdir HOME override) AND Preset {isolated: true, plugin_refs: []} WHEN worker spawns and lists available plugins THEN test-canary-plugin is NOT in the listing

successMetrics.target: 100% of non-manager runs with preset_id have snapshot row
PASS — preset with agent-olympus plugin runs Claude worker that can invoke its slash commands

constraints: Backward compat: existing Skill Packs + 651+ tests untouched
--bare auth PoC (Phase 10A) is a hard gate — failure halts entire Phase 10
Plugin files placed manually in server/plugins/ (no upload API in v1)
Tier 2 is Claude-only; Codex/OpenCode workers get Tier 1 and a warning
Preset snapshots are immutable post-spawn (no retroactive rewriting)

openQuestions.question: Does `--bare` + CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN env actually keep OAuth session valid?
openQuestions.recommendedDefault: Run Phase 10A spike. If fail, suspend the phase and redesign auth flow.
openQuestions.impact: Blocker — entire Phase 10 depends on this.

openQuestions.question: Is server/plugins/ gitignored or a git submodule?
openQuestions.recommendedDefault: gitignored + document in README. Submodule deferred to v2.

openQuestions.question: Reuse mcp_server_templates for Tier 1 vs new table?
openQuestions.recommendedDefault: Reuse mcp_server_templates. Existing allowlist/denylist policies already cover Tier 1 needs.

openQuestions.question: Should Preset reference existing Skill Packs (preset.skill_pack_ids)?
openQuestions.recommendedDefault: No in v1. Keep Preset and Skill Pack orthogonal. Revisit in v2.

phaseBreakdown.name: Spawn Wiring — Tier 1 only (MCP + prompt, all adapters)
